title: Sexual health in elder care
blurb: Developed at the LGBT+ nursing home Slottet. Training and toolkits that meet older adults' sexuality with dignity.

testimonials.quote: [mock] We didn't dare raise the subject with residents before. After Signe's session we have a shared way of talking about it.
[mock] Staff had questions they'd been sitting on for years. Now we have answers to share.
[mock] My father has dementia and still has needs. Signe's tools helped me as a family member frame it as care, not taboo.
